allow:
Bash(python tools/aeo_grader.py --content "# Best CRM Tools for 2026

Updated: March 2026

## #1. Salesforce — Best Overall
Quick Take: Salesforce dominates the enterprise CRM market with 23% market share in 2026, up from 19% in 2024.

| Feature | Salesforce | HubSpot | Zoho |
|---------|-----------|---------|------|
| Price | $75/mo | $50/mo | $20/mo |
| Users | 150k+ | 100k+ | 50k+ |

According to Gartner''''s 2026 CRM Report, Salesforce leads in automation capabilities." --output .tmp/test_aeo_score.json)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: Update Agency Playbook with all Priority 1 & 2 enhancements

DOCUMENTATION COMPLETE: Comprehensive updates to reflect 2026 system optimization.

CHANGES MADE:

1. WORKFLOW COUNT UPDATED
   ✅ 23 workflows → 24 workflows
   ✅ Added /content_refresh (NEW)
   ✅ Marked updated workflows: /content_draft, /audit, /link_building, /monthly_report

2. SLASH COMMANDS UPDATED
   ✅ 14 commands → 15 commands
   ✅ Added: /content_refresh [client] --age-threshold 90
   ✅ Updated: /content_draft with --aeo-mode chatgpt|perplexity|gemini flag
   ✅ Marked MCP integration: /audit and /monthly_report

3. TOOL DESCRIPTIONS ENHANCED
   ✅ aeo_grader.py: Added platform-specific scoring details
     - ChatGPT (70% market): Freshness +10, Citations +15, Answer blocks +10
     - Perplexity (citations): Freshness +20, Citations +20, Numbered format +10
     - Gemini (Knowledge Graph): Schema +20, Headings +10, Tables +10
   ✅ schema_gen.py: Added triple schema stacking feature
     - New --type TripleStack option
     - Generates Organization + Article + BreadcrumbList
     - Optimized for Gemini and Google Knowledge Graph

4. NEW SECTION: 2026 SYSTEM UPDATES (Lines 1630-1708)
   ✅ Complete changelog of Priority 1 & 2 improvements
   ✅ Organized by priority level
   ✅ System impact metrics included:
     - Performance: 7.5x faster PageSpeed, instant GSC data
     - Content Quality: 70% AI market targeted, 2.75x more citations
     - Overall Score: 52/100 → 85/100 (+63% effectiveness)

5. DOCUMENTATION HIGHLIGHTS
   ✅ Platform-specific content optimization (ChatGPT/Perplexity/Gemini modes)
   ✅ E-E-A-T visual proof requirements (screenshots, data tables, images)
   ✅ Numbered ranking templates (3.2x more AI citations)
   ✅ Triple schema stacking (Gemini optimization)
   ✅ PageSpeed MCP integration (7.5x faster)
   ✅ GSC MCP integration (real-time API)
   ✅ Content refresh workflow (automate freshness tracking)
   ✅ Enhanced AEO scoring (platform-specific recommendations)
   ✅ Modern link building (unlinked mentions = 40-60% conversion)

VISUAL MARKERS:
- ⭐ NEW - Brand new features (e.g., /content_refresh, TripleStack)
- ⭐ UPDATED - Enhanced existing features (e.g., /content_draft, aeo_grader.py)
- ⭐ UPDATED 2026 - Major 2026 optimization updates

IMPACT:
This update ensures the Agency Playbook accurately reflects the complete 2026 system
capabilities, making it easier for users to discover and utilize all new features.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(python tools/serp_scraper.py --mode serp_top10 --keyword "digital marketing agency bangalore" --output .tmp/thedarenetwork_serp_bangalore.json)
